series_metadata.series_description: This form is attached to the IT-1040 and indicates the amount of Accumulated Distribution Income to be included in Ohio Adjusted Gross Income. That amount is placed on Line 20 of the IT-1040. This form is filed as required and is a one part form.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: records in office files attached IT-1040 and destroyed according destruction schedule of IT-1040. (Schedule Number - 110/115-01)
